sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5328" key="a)mmodu/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμμο-δύτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, (prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-δυότας</foreign> codd.) <sense id="n5328.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burrowing in sand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πάγουρος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.196</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Stat. Flacc.). [<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠ</itype>, but cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χηραμοδύτης, σισυρνοδύτης.</foreign>]</sense> </entryFree>
